candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, consider a nonlinear inductor which is defined by $\phi = i + \tanh (i)$. Let the current through this inductor be $i(t) = \sin t$. Find the voltage across it.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 考虑一个非线性电感器,其磁通量$\phi$与电流$i$的关系为$\phi = i + \tanh(i)$。若通过该电感器的电流为$i(t)= \sin t$,求该电感器两端的电压。
